# Motorcycle Accessories Shop Site — Nigeria-First Research Brief

**Niche ID:** P3-motorcycle-accessories-moto-accessories-shop
**Vertical slug:** motorcycle-accessories
**VN-ID:** VN-COM-AUT-004
**Niche family:** NF-COM-AUT (variant of used-car-dealer)
**Family role:** variant
**Research date:** 2026-04-26

## 1. Nigerian Business Reality
Nigeria has an estimated 5–10 million commercial motorcycles (okada) and over 1 million tricycles (keke napep). Motorcycle accessories markets cluster around Ladipo (Lagos), Onitsha Main Market, and Kano Singer Market. Products include helmets, jackets, gloves, spare parts (chains, tyres, brake pads), oils, and electrical components. Chinese motorcycles (Jincheng, Qingqi, Daylong, Haojue) dominate. SON certification for safety equipment and NAFDAC for lubricants are key compliance requirements. WhatsApp parts enquiry is the standard first contact.

## 2. Target Audience Profile
- **Okada rider Musa, 28, Kano**: Needs chain, brake pads, and helmet for daily commercial use. WhatsApps to check availability and price. Visits on off day.
- **Keke owner Chukwudi, 35, Onitsha**: Sourcing spare parts for three-wheeler fleet (5 units). Needs bulk pricing for tyres and electrical parts. Calls or WhatsApps dealer.
- **Dispatch rider supervisor Taiwo, 30, Lagos**: Manages 20-rider fleet for logistics company. Needs helmets (SON-certified), jackets, and high-vis vests in bulk.

## 3. Recommended Website Structure
- **Home**: Hero (shop name, "Your Complete Motorcycle Accessories Hub"), WhatsApp parts enquiry CTA, featured accessories grid (6 items with ₦ prices), trust strip (SON, NAFDAC, CAC), brand logos
- **About**: Shop history, sourcing network (Ladipo/Onitsha/Kano), brand partnerships, SON compliance
- **Products (Accessories Catalogue)**: Helmets, safety gear, spare parts, lubricants — all with ₦ pricing, brand/model compatibility notes
- **Contact**: WhatsApp enquiry (primary), location, enquiry form (NDPR-compliant)

## 4. Content Tone & Voice
Safety-first, practical, and brand-authoritative. "Ride Safe, Ride Strong", "SON-Certified Helmets", "Bulk Pricing for Fleet Operators". Primary CTA: "Find Parts via WhatsApp". Secondary: "Browse Accessories". Avoid: western motorcycle lifestyle imagery.

## 5. Trust Signal Inventory
- SON safety certification for helmets and protective gear
- NAFDAC registration for lubricants
- CAC business registration
- Brand distributor authorisation (Jincheng, Haojue, etc.)
- Bulk/fleet pricing availability badge
- Anti-counterfeit guarantee
- Delivery to other states notice

## 6. Image Direction (5-7 Specific Concepts)
1. Accessories shop interior — helmets, jackets, spare parts displayed, Nigerian market setting
2. SON-certified helmet close-up — certification sticker visible, quality focus
3. Okada rider wearing full safety gear — helmet, jacket, gloves, Lagos traffic background
4. Spare parts display — chains, brake pads, tyres organised by brand/model
5. Keke napep three-wheeler — Nigerian urban setting, Onitsha or Kano
6. Bulk fleet order — stacked helmets and jackets for dispatch company
7. Shop exterior signage — professional, Ladipo or Onitsha market context

## 7. Regulatory Compliance Checklist
- [ ] SON conformity certificate for helmets and safety equipment
- [ ] NAFDAC registration for lubricants
- [ ] CAC business registration number
- [ ] Brand manufacturer distributor authorisation
- [ ] NDPR consent on enquiry form

## 8. Nigeria-First Compliance Checklist
- [x] WhatsApp parts enquiry CTA prominent
- [x] SON/NAFDAC trust signals
- [x] Ladipo/Onitsha/Kano market reference
- [x] ₦ pricing per item
- [x] Nigerian motorcycle brands referenced (Jincheng, Haojue, Qingqi)
- [x] Mobile-first layout
- [x] esc() on all inputs
- [x] NDPR on enquiry form
